So I have been playing the game for years now and I had a really good reputation and I was lvl 150 and I was in a clan so I was doing great. Until I mat an ex moderator named tkgreedy who hates everyone for no reason and I think he banned me for no reason. Now every time I click PvP or horror I get kicked out of the game immediately. And other people also reported me for no reason. I even have a saying when people get mad at me it’s “what is it this time am I cheating targeting or being toxic” So I guess I’m banned forever. And the PvP is really fun and I would recommend the game.

reviews.review_title: One of the best horror games out there!
reviews.review_description:
This is no Big Scary or Scary baboon… YET! What this game does is take those 2 formats and perfects them to max and plus it has guns to for Gorilla Royale boys. The only issues I had for this game were glitch’s and they both got patched! 
Glitch 1: The bridge levels lighting not working, this made the level near impossible without a person with the mod menu to fly you to the end but as I said this has been patched!
Glitch 2: The level buttons not working, when I got this game when I beat a level I would not unlock the button forcing me to run through the entire game again to reach the level I want to play but GUESS WHAT!?, it’s patched!🎉
This is a small little issue I have with the shop, it really needs a confirm purchase button rather than automatically making you purchase the item like I accidentally bought a dang coconut hat but hey at least it’s kinda fire though lol.
As soon as this game has more levels and maybe an open world area with monsters that aren’t next bots but that’s just something I would like lol but as soon as this has at least 15 levels I’m gonna hope I can go above 5 stars!
Thanks for reading!
